examples: She was advised to have an abdominal X-ray.
An instrument called a trocar makes a puncture in the abdominal wall.
He died of an abdominal infection caused by a rupture of his stomach.
Two weeks ago, I awoke at 6:30 a.m. with a tingly face and sore abdominal muscles.
An ultrasound, however, turned up a more serious condition: an abdominal aortic aneurysm (AAA).
